name: Legislation Funnel
summary: Track a bill from drafting instruction through both houses to assent and implementation.
whenToUseIt: Use this for any lawmaking analysis, parliamentary tracking, advocacy strategy, or legislative project.
steps: Identify the policy trigger and drafting instruction.
Map the bill's introduction and principal chamber debates.
Mark committee scrutiny, amendment points, and Senate leverage.
Check what must happen for both houses to agree on the same text.
List the post-assent requirements: regulations, agencies, guidance, systems, and budgets.
example: A government bill may survive the House quickly, then encounter real bargaining in the Senate before assent and administrative implementation.
